summary.intent: Push a new release of the project, including version bump, changelog update, and git tag.
summary.outcome: Release was prepared with auto-computed version, changelog updated in both CHANGELOG.md and website/changelog/index.html, committed, tagged, and pushed.

repo: Project uses a prepare-release script that auto-computes the version and updates CHANGELOG.md and website/changelog/index.html.
Biome is used for code formatting; RECOMMENDED_PROVIDERS array requires multi-line formatting per biome rules.

code.finding: Updated as part of release prep workflow
Mirror of changelog kept in sync with CHANGELOG.md during releases
Had an extra blank line removed in prior commit 2f777a9d as part of biome formatting fixes

workflow: Release flow: run prepare-release script, review changes, commit, tag, and push in one step.
Prior to release, a formatting cleanup commit (2f777a9d) was made to satisfy biome linting rules.
